arts.ttl: How Man Utd and Arsenal missed out on 'a €100m player for half the price'
arts.sum: Olise’s ability was well known to United and Arsenal after his exploits for Palace, with the Frenchman grabbing 16 goal contributions in just 19 Premier League games last season. A host of teams were in the market for Michael Olise this summer but Bayern Munich came out on top, signing the Crystal Palace winger for €53m.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sheds light on rules around Manchester United staff texting players
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has given an insight into how things work at Manchester United ahead of his side's crunch clash with fellow top-four hopefuls Tottenham

arts.ttl: Premier League to make major transfer window change impacting Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: Premier League clubs have agreed to change the summer transfer window end date, it has been claimed. The Times write that all 20 top-flight teams have agreed that next summer's window will shut on August 15, before the 2025/2026 campaign begins.

arts.ttl: Can you name the eight players to play for both Spurs and Man Utd in the Premier League?
arts.sum: Via the quiz module below, type your guesses in of which of our players you think have played for both Spurs and Man United in the Premier League since 1992. Name the eight players to have played for both us and Manchester United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United take on Tottenham Hotspur at Old Trafford in the Premier League on Sunday after both sides were in Europa League action midweek. The last five meetings have seen 21 goals scored, including a 3-2 victory for Man Utd in 2021/22 and a 6-1 win for Spurs the season prior.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Liverpool's Alexander-Arnold contract decision; Real Madrid target Man Utd star
arts.sum: Chelsea are also one of a number of clubs who were turned down by Barcelona winger Raphinha during the summer transfer window. Real Madrid have been linked with Alexander-Arnold but could instead target Manchester United's Diogo Dalot as an alternative, although the Premier League giants have no desire to let the Portugal international leave.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd have NO regrets over Jadon Sancho transfer despite Chelsea form
arts.sum: However, despite a bright start upon his return to the first team, Sancho’s form eventually fizzled out and it was not long before his performances in training were being questioned by Ten Hag, with the public criticism proving to be the breaking point in the pair’s relationship. Sancho was essentially never going to succeed at United after infuriating the club and Ten Hag with his attitude off-the-pitch and inconsistent displays on it, leaving Chelsea to benefit from picking up the pieces of a talented player seeking a fresh start.

arts.ttl: 'Leaving Tottenham for Man Utd was not a tough call – this is what meant most to me'
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham has explained exactly what led him to make the move from Tottenham to Manchester United in 1997 - and it wasn't down to the goal-scoring opportunities or trophy dreams

arts.ttl: 'I swore at my agent when Man City tried to sign me - I only ever wanted Man Utd'
arts.sum: Dimitar Berbatov has recalled an expletive rant to his agent when Manchester United came knocking for his signature, citing how his dream was to play at Old Trafford and not the Etihad

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag handed Man United sack deadline, board could pull the trigger by then
arts.sum: Manchester United are unhappy with their current start to the season and manager Erik ten Hag is under tremendous pressure. The Dutch manager was expected to guide Manchester United to major trophies this season, but he has failed to get the best out of his team once again.
